systems.system_notes: Platform shoulder arthroplasty system supporting anatomic and reverse shoulder reconstruction.

trays.tray_notes: Official Zimmer Biomet materials support dedicated Comprehensive shoulder instrumentation and linked technique resources.

components.component_notes: Official materials describe the humeral stem platform used across the shoulder reconstruction family.
Official materials describe the anatomic glenoid component family within the platform.
Official materials describe humeral head options for anatomic shoulder reconstruction.
Official materials describe the reverse glenosphere family within the platform.
Official materials describe the reverse humeral bearing component within the platform.

unresolved_items.raw_text: The public Comprehensive shoulder page defines the platform and reconstruction families but does not expose a public implant code table in this pass.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper brochure, IFU, or technique pass is required for product-code detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction remains at tray and implant-family level.
